title: <<COMPONENTNAME>> southbound adapter configuration
description: The configuration <<COMPONENTNAME>> itself understands: the object at `component.global` in an EdgeCommons config file. Each entry of `component.instances[]` — one field device / endpoint — is validated against `#/$defs/instance`. The library envelope (logging, messaging, metricEmission, heartbeat, streaming, credentials, parameters, health, hierarchy, identity, topic, tags) is owned by the canonical schema (schema/edgecommons-config-schema.json) and is deliberately NOT redeclared here. This schema is derived from the scaffold's example adapter config (test-configs/<<COMPONENTNAME>>.json) and the keys app/<<COMPONENTNAME>>.py reads. Replace the protocol-agnostic placeholders with your protocol's real keys as you implement it, and keep `additionalProperties: false` so a typo'd or unknown key is caught at deploy time instead of being silently ignored.

defaults.description: Defaults applied to every instance unless the instance overrides them.

pollIntervalMs.description: Milliseconds between polls of the device in the adapter's poll loop. Subscribe-based protocols ignore it.

instance.title: <<COMPONENTNAME>> device instance
instance.description: One entry of `component.instances[]`: a single device/endpoint. Each instance runs on its own worker thread and publishes to its own UNS data topics (ecv1/{device}/{component}/{instance}/data/{signalPath}).

id.description: Unique instance identifier. It is the `{instance}` token of this instance's UNS topics and is stamped into the envelope identity and into `body.device.instance`.

adapter.description: Protocol identifier emitted in `body.device.adapter` of every SouthboundSignalUpdate (for example `opcua`, `modbus`, `ethernetip`).

pollIntervalMs.description: Per-instance poll period, in milliseconds — the value the adapter's poll loop actually reads. Falls back to 1000 when unset.

connection.description: How to reach this device. The scaffold ships no fixed keys here: declare your protocol's own connection keys (host/port/unitId, an OPC UA endpoint URL, a serial port + baud rate, credentials, timeouts).

publish.description: How updates from this device are batched northbound. Topics are minted by the UNS builder and are never configured here.

batchMs.description: Coalescing window in milliseconds: samples arriving within the window ride in one SouthboundSignalUpdate. 0 publishes every change immediately.

write.description: The southbound write (device command) surface for this device.

enabled.description: Whether this adapter accepts writes toward the device.

topic.description: Topic the adapter subscribes to for write requests. Supports the {ComponentName} and {InstanceId} placeholders.

read.description: The on-demand read surface for this device.

topic.description: Topic the adapter subscribes to for on-demand read requests. Supports the {ComponentName} and {InstanceId} placeholders.

comment.description: Free-form note. Ignored by the adapter; carried so annotated example configs stay valid.
